name: mt5-company
description: Company-style Codex workflow for MT5 EA development with repo-local skills, shared MCP config, and company self-improvement history.

interface.shortDescription: Company-style workflow for MT5 EA development.
interface.longDescription: Routes MT5 EA work through repo-local intake, review, backtest, release, and company-improvement skills so both the EA and the workflow stay reproducible in Git.
defaultPrompt: Triage this EA idea and turn it into an implementation plan.
Review this .mq5 file for execution or risk bugs.
Analyze this MT5 tester result and propose the next change.
